history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead at (06, D) is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. To the left (west) at (07, C) is a wall (#). To the right (east) at (07, E) is a safe floor cell (.). There is no visible goal, so I should explore the safe paths. Turning right will allow me to move into the floor cell to the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead at row 06, column D is a safe floor (`.`). Moving forward is safe. There is no visible goal yet, so I will continue exploring north.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a floor (`.`), safe to move into. No lava or wall ahead. The goal is not yet visible, but moving forward will reveal more of the map to the north. Other directions are blocked by walls (right) or lava (left). So moving forward is the best action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent has moved forward and is now at a new position, still facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is a floor (`.`), safe to move into. Lava is to the left, wall to the right, so the only safe direction is forward. The goal is not yet visible, but moving forward will explore northward and potentially reveal the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a floor (`.`), safe to move into. Lava cells are to the left (column C) and the right is blocked by a wall (column E). Continuing forward will reveal more of the map toward the north and possibly the goal, while remaining safe. No other actions are viable.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a floor (`.`), safe to move into. Lava is to the left and a wall to the right, so moving forward is the only safe option. Continuing north may reveal the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a floor (`.`), safe to move into. Lava is to the left and a wall to the right, so moving forward is the only safe action. Continuing north will reveal more of the map and possibly the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a wall (`#`). Moving forward is impossible. To the left, cells (07, C), (07, B), (07, A) are floor cells. So I will turn left to face west and then move along the clear path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) and the cell directly ahead (06, D) is a safe floor cell. The path ahead in column D appears to be clear of walls and lava, leading directly to the goal at (01, D). I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead at (06, D) is a safe floor cell, and the path continues straight up column D to the goal at (02, D) without any obstacles. Moving forward is the correct action to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at (06, D) facing north. The goal is directly ahead at (03, D). The path forward is clear: all cells ahead (05, D), (04, D) are safe floor, and (03, D) is the goal. No lava blocks the way. I will move forward to get closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (06, D) facing north. The goal is at (04, D) and the cells ahead are safe floor. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north at the bottom-center (row 07, column D). The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is safe floor, and the cell beyond that (row 05, column D) is the goal. There is no lava in my path. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, and the cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is the goal. There are no obstacles or lava in my path. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
